name: Performapal Fire Mufflerlion
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＥＭ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>エンタメイト</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ファイア・マフライオ
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
When a Pendulum Monster you control is destroyed by battle: You can Special Summon this card from your Pendulum Zone.

[ Monster Effect ] 
Once per turn, if a Pendulum Monster you control destroys an opponent's monster by battle, after damage calculation: You can make that monster you control gain 200 ATK until the end of the Battle Phase, and if you do, it can make a second attack in a row.
pend_eff: When a Pendulum Monster you control is destroyed by battle: You can Special Summon this card from your Pendulum Zone.
mnst_eff: Once per turn, if a Pendulum Monster you control destroys an opponent's monster by battle, after damage calculation: You can make that monster you control gain 200 ATK until the end of the Battle Phase, and if you do, it can make a second attack in a row.
eff: Once per turn, if a Pendulum Monster you control destroys an opponent's monster by battle, after damage calculation: You can make that monster you control gain 200 ATK until the end of the Battle Phase, and if you do, it can make a second attack in a row.

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Pendulum Zone
